crime.value: Murder of pregnant woman by jealous lover who accused her of infidelity
crime.quote: one of the pregnant woman had been murdered by her jealous lover who had accused her of infidelity

victim.value: Pregnant squatter woman accused of infidelity by her jealous lover
victim.quote: one of the pregnant woman had been murdered by her jealous lover who had accused her of infidelity

closed_world.value: Isolated rental house built on unholy ground where squatters once lived
closed_world.quote: It's in the middle of nowhere... nothing for... What...? A mile on either side and nothing but woods

culprit_and_motive.value: Jealous lover killed pregnant woman believing she was unfaithful
culprit_and_motive.quote: one of the pregnant woman had been murdered by her jealous lover who had accused her of infidelity

investigator.value: The narrator telling her supernatural experience to Doctor Leo
investigator.quote: So, Doctor Leo, I still get chills from thinking about that encounter

red_herring.value: Initial supernatural explanation for events later revealed to have historical human cause
red_herring.quote: no one had died in the building. But Mom was not satisfied with that answer

clue_fairness.value: All supernatural manifestations described in detail as experienced by narrator
clue_fairness.quote: There was an evil face imprinted on that shade. I sat up all night, arms crossed and glared

social_world.value: Family hierarchy with mother as information broker and decision maker
social_world.quote: I had my mother look into the history of the house

reveal_mechanic.value: Historical research reveals murder on the land where house was built
reveal_mechanic.quote: pregnant woman had been murdered by her jealous lover who had accused her of infidelity

media_and_audience.value: Framed as testimony to Doctor Leo, positioning events as case study
media_and_audience.quote: One of the reasons,Doctor Leo, I remembered this episode so vividly

investigator_wound.value: Mother's protective instinct triggered by threat to her baby
investigator_wound.quote: Leave my baby alone, for God's sake
